_comment: Committed perf regression baseline. Sized to tolerate shared-runner variance on GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest (observed range 0.5ms-11ms across runs). Each baseline = 25ms, which sits well below the 50ms absolute budget (tests/test_perf.py) but catches a genuine ≥25x slowdown vs local ~1ms baseline. The absolute budget is the primary gate; this regression assertion is a secondary smoke that should never flake. Refresh procedure: docs/perf-budget.md.
